rationale: Round-2 delta (git diff 4dfebbcb a2f2451) touches exactly 3 files, test/comment only: panel_decision_test.go (rename x/y→revA/revB RC slot names + explanatory comment), panel_gate_e2e_test.go (added one 'unresolved REQUEST_CHANGES' assert), gate.go (one-word comment reword 'byte-superset'→'substring-set superset'). No production logic changed: gate.go diff is a single comment word; tally.go untouched entirely. No internal/bead touched, no refutation code, no Decision.AppliedRefutations anywhere in the diff (the one 'refutation' grep hit is pre-existing unchanged context in an AC10 comment, not new). Outcome-preservation confirmed by reading the test harness: the 'two unresolved RC slots' subtest lives inside TestPanelGateDecision_UnresolvedRequestChangesBlocks, whose shared loop (line 354) asserts got.Action != Block for every row uniformly — so the renamed revA/revB row still expects Block exactly as before the rename; only the discriminating power of mustHave changed, not the expected outcome. Verified in an absolute /tmp archive of a2f2451: go build, gofmt -l, and targeted tests (UnresolvedRequestChanges, ThresholdFloorIsLayeredNotReplaced, RequestChangesBlocksComplete) all pass. Bead scope remains exactly the R1 change plus this de-hollowing fix-up; no unclassified fixture-outcome flip found.
